simple_types.name: RIFF_Format
simple_types.code:
type RIFF_Format is
  (RIFF_Format_Unknown,
   RIFF_Format_Wave,
   RIFF_Format_AVI,
   RIFF_Format_MIDI,
   RIFF_Format_Pallete,
   RIFF_Format_DIB,
   RIFF_Format_MMP);

simple_types.name: RIFF_Identifier
simple_types.code:
type RIFF_Identifier is
  (RIFF_Identifier_Unknown,
   RIFF_Identifier_Standard,
   RIFF_Identifier_Big_Endian,
   RIFF_Identifier_List,
   RIFF_Identifier_RIFF_64,
   RIFF_Identifier_Broadcast_Wave_64);

simple_types.name: Speaker_Position
simple_types.code:
type Speaker_Position is
  (Speaker_Front_Left,
   Speaker_Front_Right,
   Speaker_Front_Center,
   Speaker_Low_Frequency,
   Speaker_Back_Left,
   Speaker_Back_Right,
   Speaker_Front_Left_Of_Center,
   Speaker_Front_Right_Of_Center,
   …,
   Speaker_Top_Back_Right);

simple_types.name: Wav_Bit_Depth
Wav_Chunk_Tag
simple_types.code:
type Wav_Chunk_Tag is
  (Wav_Chunk_Unknown,
   Wav_Chunk_Fmt,
   Wav_Chunk_Data,
   Wav_Chunk_Info,
   Wav_Chunk_Junk,
   Wav_Chunk_Pad,
   Wav_Chunk_Fact,
   Wav_Chunk_Cue,
   …,
   Wav_Chunk_Channel_Info);

simple_types.name: Wav_Format_Tag
simple_types.code:
type Wav_Format_Tag is
  (Wav_Format_Unknown,
   Wav_Format_PCM,
   Wav_Format_ADPCM,
   Wav_Format_IEEE_Float,
   Wav_Format_VSELP,
   Wav_Format_IBM_CVSD,
   Wav_Format_A_Law,
   Wav_Format_Mu_Law,
   …,
   Wav_Format_Extensible)
  with Size => Unsigned_16'Size;

simple_types.name: Wav_Sample_Rate
simple_types.code:
type Wav_Sample_Rate is
  (Sample_Rate_8000,
   Sample_Rate_11025,  Sample_Rate_12000,  Sample_Rate_16000,
   Sample_Rate_22050,  Sample_Rate_24000,  Sample_Rate_32000,
   Sample_Rate_44100, …,
   Sample_Rate_352800)
  with Size => Unsigned_32'Size;

array_types.name: Channel_Configuration
array_types.code:
type Channel_Configuration is array (Speaker_Position) of Boolean
  with
    Pack, Size => Channel_Configuration_Size,
    Read       => Read_Channel_Configuration,
    Write      => Write_Channel_Configuration;

array_types.name: Sub_GUID
array_types.code: type Sub_GUID is array (1 .. 8) of Unsigned_8;

record_types.name: GUID

tagged_types.name: Wave_Format_16
Wave_Format_18
Wave_Format_Extensible

subprograms.name: Average_Bytes_Per_Second
Block_Align
Init
Is_Consistent
Read_Channel_Configuration
Should_Use_Extensible_Format
Write_Channel_Configuration
